---
title: "QA Report - SENEPA Taxonomic QA"
author: "SENEPA / PINV01-528 Team"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
fontsize: 11pt
lang: "en-GB"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)

# Ensure qa_report() has been executed and res_qa is available in the environment:
# res_qa <- qa_report(df = dataset_final_tax, tax_map = taxize_map, tax_ai = tax_AI, out_dir = "./logs/qa", name_prefix = "SENEPA_taxonomic_QA")
```

```{r executive-summary, echo=FALSE}
# Ensure required objects and functions are available
if (!exists("qa_report")) {
  # Ajusta la ruta a tu script que define qa_report()
  source("Scripts/12_qa_report.R")
}

# Try to load a cached res_qa if present
cached_path <- "./logs/qa/res_qa_latest.rds"
if (file.exists(cached_path)) {
  res_qa <- tryCatch(readRDS(cached_path), error = function(e) NULL)
}

# If still missing, run qa_report() defensivamente
if (!exists("res_qa") || is.null(res_qa)) {
  message("res_qa not found: running qa_report() now. This may take a few minutes.")
  res_qa <- tryCatch(
    qa_report(
      df = dataset_final,      # ensure dataset_final_tax exists in environment
      out_dir = "./logs/qa",
      name_prefix = "SENEPA_taxonomic_QA",
      year_range = c(1950, 2026),
      gbif_conf_threshold = 80,
      add_log = add_log
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      # write a short error file for traceability and stop knit with informative message
      err_path <- file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_error_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".txt"))
      if (!dir.exists(dirname(err_path))) dir.create(dirname(err_path), recursive = TRUE)
      writeLines(c("qa_report() failed:", conditionMessage(e)), err_path)
      stop("qa_report() failed. See: ", err_path)
    }
  )

  # Save for future renders
  try(saveRDS(res_qa, cached_path), silent = TRUE)
}
```


### Executive summary

```{r executive-summary, echo=FALSE}
if (!exists("res_qa")) stop("Object res_qa not found. Run qa_report() before rendering this report.")
overview <- res_qa$overview
cat("QA generated:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n\n")
kable(overview)
```

### Methodology

```{r methodology, echo=FALSE}
cat("This report summarizes automated checks applied to the processed dataset:\n\n")
cat("- Date validation and temporal range checks.\n")
cat("- Coordinate validation and spatial containment within Paraguay.\n")
cat("- Exact duplicate detection by species + date + lat + long.\n")
cat("- Taxonomic coverage checks against GBIF and AI-assisted mapping.\n")
cat("- Identification of low-confidence taxonomic matches and incomplete binomials.\n")
cat("- Export of summary sheets and CSVs with flags for manual review.\n")
```

### Results overview

```{r results-overview}
res_meta <- res_qa$meta
kable(tibble::tibble(
  report_generated = res_meta$report_generated,
  dataset_rows = res_meta$dataset_rows,
  report_path = res_meta$report_path
))
```

### Dates and years

```{r check-dates, fig.height=3}
bad_dates <- res_qa$bad_dates
kable(tibble::tibble(total_bad_dates = nrow(bad_dates)))
if (nrow(bad_dates) > 0) {
  kable(head(bad_dates, 10))
}
```

### Coordinates and spatial containment

```{r check-coords, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
bad_coords <- res_qa$bad_coords
swap_candidates <- res_qa$swap_candidates

kable(tibble::tibble(
  invalid_coords = nrow(bad_coords),
  swap_candidates = nrow(swap_candidates)
))

# Map valid vs problematic points
dataset_points <- res_qa$bad_coords %>% select(LATn = LATn, LONGn = LONGn, SPECIES_CLEAN) %>% mutate(type = "invalid")
valid_points <- tibble::tibble()
if (exists("dataset_final_tax")) {
  valid_points <- dataset_final_tax %>%
    filter(!is.na(LAT) & !is.na(LONG)) %>%
    mutate(LATn = as.numeric(LAT), LONGn = as.numeric(LONG)) %>%
    select(LATn, LONGn, SPECIES_CLEAN) %>%
    mutate(type = "valid")
}

pts_plot <- bind_rows(valid_points, dataset_points) %>% filter(!is.na(LATn) & !is.na(LONGn))

if (nrow(pts_plot) > 0) {
  world <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray95", color = "gray80") +
    geom_point(data = pts_plot %>% filter(type == "valid"), aes(x = LONGn, y = LATn), color = "#2b8cbe", alpha = 0.4, size = 0.6) +
    geom_point(data = pts_plot %>% filter(type == "invalid"), aes(x = LONGn, y = LATn), color = "#e34a33", alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
    coord_quickmap(xlim = c(-65, -50), ylim = c(-30, -15)) +
    labs(title = "Spatial distribution: valid points (blue) and problematic points (red)", x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude")
} else {
  plot.new(); text(0.5, 0.5, "No coordinate points available to map", cex = 1.1)
}
```

### Exact duplicates

```{r check-dups}
dups <- res_qa$exact_dups
kable(tibble::tibble(total_exact_duplicates = nrow(dups)))
if (nrow(dups) > 0) {
  kable(head(dups, 10))
}
```

### Taxonomic checks

```{r check-taxonomy}
no_gbif <- res_qa$species_no_gbif
low_conf <- res_qa$low_conf
incomplete_binomial <- res_qa$incomplete_binomial
compare_ai <- res_qa$compare_ai

kable(tibble::tibble(
  species_without_gbif = nrow(no_gbif),
  species_low_confidence = nrow(low_conf),
  incomplete_binomials = nrow(incomplete_binomial),
  species_in_ai_map = ifelse(nrow(compare_ai) > 0, sum(compare_ai$IN_AI), NA_integer_)
))

if (nrow(no_gbif) > 0) {
  write_csv(no_gbif, file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_no_gbif_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".csv")))
  kable(head(no_gbif, 20))
}

if (nrow(low_conf) > 0) {
  write_csv(low_conf, file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_low_conf_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".csv")))
  kable(head(low_conf, 20))
}

if (nrow(incomplete_binomial) > 0) {
  write_csv(incomplete_binomial, file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_incomplete_binomial_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".csv")))
  kable(head(incomplete_binomial, 20))
}
```

### Summary by disease

```{r summary-by-disease}
by_disease <- res_qa$summary_by_disease
kable(head(by_disease, 50))
```

### Examples and export

```{r examples-and-export}
examples_path <- file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_examples_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".csv"))
examples <- bind_rows(
  head(res_qa$bad_dates, 10),
  head(res_qa$bad_coords, 10),
  head(res_qa$incomplete_binomial, 10),
  head(res_qa$exact_dups, 10)
) %>% distinct() %>% slice_head(n = 50)

if (!dir.exists("logs/qa")) dir.create("logs/qa", recursive = TRUE)
readr::write_csv(examples, examples_path)
cat("Examples exported to:", examples_path, "\n")
kable(head(examples, 20))
```

### Conclusions and recommended actions

```{r conclusions, echo=FALSE}
cat("Manual review priorities:\n")
cat("1) Species without GBIF matches and low-confidence matches.\n")
cat("2) Incomplete binomials and names flagged for manual correction.\n")
cat("3) Coordinates outside bounds and potential LAT/LONG swaps.\n")
cat("4) Exact duplicates to be resolved by selecting the record with the most precise georeference.\n\n")
cat("Generated files are stored in logs/qa and reports for traceability. Record decisions in processing_log.csv.\n")
```

### Metadata and reproducibility

```{r metadata}
meta_path <- file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_metadata_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".csv"))
qa_meta <- tibble::tibble(
  report_generated = Sys.time(),
  dataset_rows = res_meta$dataset_rows,
  report_path = res_meta$report_path,
  examples_path = examples_path,
  operator = Sys.getenv("USER", unset = "unknown")
)
readr::write_csv(qa_meta, meta_path)
cat("Metadata saved to:", meta_path, "\n")
session_info_path <- file.path("logs/qa", paste0("qa_sessioninfo_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".txt"))
readr::write_lines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), session_info_path)
cat("Session info saved to:", session_info_path, "\n")
```

```{r session-info, echo=FALSE}
# Optionally print session info summary
cat("R session info summary:\n")
print(sessionInfo()[c("R.version", "platform", "running")])
```
